response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with diverse polyglot experience, but the resume shows no recent or substantial C++ development on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle work, and no fixed-income or investment-banking domain exposure. The only directly relevant C/C++ role (National Instruments, 2014-2015) is over a decade old and brief. Core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Senior engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Broad polyglot background including some past C/C++ at National Instruments
Excellent communication shown via talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: No recent C++ experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no Windows platform focus
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C++ on Windows
No capital markets / fixed income domain
